    @allure.title("修改产品为空字符串（边界测试）")
    @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.NORMAL)
    @allure.description("验证必填字段不能为空")
    def test_update_product_with_empty_name(self, api_client, product_write_api, product_read_api, create_product_for_update):
        """
        测试：尝试将产品名称修改为空字符串
        """
        product_id = create_product_for_update
    
        with allure.step("尝试修改名称为空字符串"):
            update_data = {
                "id": product_id,
                "name": "" # 空字符串
            }
    
        resp = product_write_api.update_product(product_id, update_data)
        allure.attach(
            json.dumps(resp, indent = 2, ensure_ascii = False),
            name = "修改响应",
            attachment_type = allure.attachment_type.JSON
        )
    
        with allure.step("断言业务状态"):
            if resp['message'] == 'success':
                verify = product_read_api.get_detail(column="id", value=product_id)
                # 如果后端允许空字符串，记录但不失败
>               assert verify['result']['data'][0]['name'] != '', f"错误，接口传递参数导致产品的name为空！：{verify}"
E               AssertionError: 错误，接口传递参数导致产品的name为空！：{'message': 'success', 'result': {'pageIndex': 0, 'pageSize': 1, 'total': 1, 'data': [{'id': 'test_update_1777902315297', 'name': '', 'photoUrl': '/assets/device-product.png', 'describe': '这是一个自动化测试创建的产品，用完即删', 'classifiedId': '-222-', 'classifiedName': '智能电力', 'deviceType': {'text': '直连设备', 'value': 'device'}, 'state': 0, 'creatorId': '21232f297a57a5a743894a0e4a801fc3', 'createTime': 1777902315301, 'creatorName': 'Administrator', 'modifierId': '21232f297a57a5a743894a0e4a801fc3', 'modifyTime': 1777902315305, 'modifierName': 'Administrator'}]}, 'status': 200, 'timestamp': 1777902315312}
E               assert '' != ''
